26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @THECosmosTerror did this minimalist drawing of adorkastock!
27 Man Tax: Jonathan Bailey
“The most dangerous phrase in the language is, "We've always done it this way." - Grace Hopper So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Mark Kelly shows Tulsi Gabbard and Director Ratcliffe a Trump email to donors/supporters promising he'd let them receive his private National Security Briefings for cash
item.description: Before anyone asks, I don't know why they're all sitting in one chair to the right of their respective name plates. Ossoff is in Mark Kelly's.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Costco CEO, Ron Vachris, did the “CEO Eats Their Own Product” challenge by destroying a hot dog and confirms the Costco hot dog combo is staying at $1.50 forever.

item.title: An ancient technique for lifting giant stone blocks using a Lewis tool
item.description: Video by bilimtuel
item.dc:creator: bohund

item.title: Not being organized is a luxury we can no longer afford
item.description: Going to voting booths is important but can not be all. You have to organize, more than ever! Is there a DSA Chapter near by you? A ICE Rapid response Team (ICErr.com) or some folk who organized No-King-Rallies or a food-no-bombs group? JOIN THEM! You think you are too old? Doesn't matter at all, as long you respect the youngsters. You think you have not enough money or time to organize. You will be surprise how supportive people around you will impact your live. You think about yourself as an asshole and doesn't wont to hurt people. Be sure they will tell you when you go to far. Classic Social Anxiety or simple introverted? I can not say how often I heard from people with this Disorder how comfortable they feet in political groups, how different it was from anything they had known before. You have not the knowledge about politics? They will talk about it and talk about it and talk about it and ... BTW, also a great place to train your abilities to say "No" and "Stop". You are thinking about yourself that you can't contribute anything to the group? Wrong. Did I miss anything?
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: Rachel Maddow (@maddowshow): "I gotta say, I don't know why this isn't more of a show-stopping scandal in our country" – It's hard to keep up with all the scandals with this administration
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Israel struck Iran's largest natural gas processing plant in a coordinated operation with the US. Two senior Israeli officials told Axios the strike was carried out with US approval. – Trump claiming the US "knew nothing" about the strike
item.description:
Israel attacked the gas processing plant 'Asaluyeh' in the city of Bushehr in southwestern Iran. It is considered the largest and most important gas facility in Iran. Almost 80% of Iranian electricity is generated from natural gas, and half of it comes from "South Pars".
BREAKING NEWS: Iran strikes Ras Laffan refinery in Qatar, triggering a fire at one of the world's largest LNG and gas processing hubs.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Memes vol 643
item.description:
“Waaaa she probably thinks she’s better than the people who use AI” yes I do. Use your brain. I think I died in the inside when my coworker told me she used ChatGPT to wrote her mom’s eulogy.
So yeah this mindset hasn’t happened to me yet
I’ve never seen love island but I have to imagine this would be hilarious
So Lyonel preferred men, right?
I used to work with someone who found her cat outside in a dumpster and said he was part Maine coon… chat when I tell you this cat was a fat domestic long hair. So obviously Big Mama is a Maine coon because she’s polydactyl, right?
This is insane they’re identical
Gertie tax
Baby Bruce tax
Nessie tax
Big Mama tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: GovBrief Today #412
item.description: The Pentagon today asked the White House for $200 billion to continue a war that neither of them has the constitutional authority to declare. The Constitution assigns only Congress the power to declare war. Three weeks into bombing Iran, they've abandoned it for the third time. Wednesday's war powers resolution failed 53-47 after Republicans voted en masse to kill it. The official who oversees all 18 American intelligence agencies then told senators that only the president could determine whether Iran was an imminent threat before the attack. Her own counterterrorism chief resigned the day before, saying it was not. The Treasury Department confirmed Wednesday that the national debt crossed $39 trillion, the same day the Pentagon asked for the money to keep bombing the third country we've attacked since December. Call your senators and remind them they swore an oath to the document that puts war authority in their hands. Demand they honor it. We've emailed 6,600+ stories over 412 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260318-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/nebraska-wildfires [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar18 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-walkout [4] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-march26 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/debt-accelerates [6] https://go.govbrief.today/oil-pressure [7] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-supplemental [8] https://go.govbrief.today/second-honors [9] https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-iran [10] https://go.govbrief.today/wi-attorney-bondi [11] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-data [12] https://go.govbrief.today/contreras-released [13] https://go.govbrief.today/mullin-nom-hearing [14] https://go.govbrief.today/gop-war-vote [15] https://go.govbrief.today/radar-separation [16] https://go.govbrief.today/rodney-statue [17] https://go.govbrief.today/duffy-sil [18] https://go.govbrief.today/harris-scotus Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
